tv.generator-info-name: WebGrab+Plus/w MDB & REX Postprocess -- version V5.2.0.0 -- Jan van Straaten

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights
programme.desc: Yanna becomes the target of a stalker who is determined to become part of her life ... and remove Yanna's roommate and best friend Gabby in the process.

programme.title: Monster-in-Law
programme.desc: The love life of Charlotte is reduced to an endless string of disastrous blind dates, until she meets the perfect man, Kevin. Unfortunately, his merciless mother will do anything to destroy their relationship.

programme.title: Films & Stars
programme.desc: Films and Stars cover the hottest events from the big screen every week.

programme.title: The Chase S16
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and his criminally clever Chaser are back for yet another battle of the brains - can our contestants beat the Chaser, or will it be just another day at the office?

programme.title: Famous Foodies S3
programme.desc: Famous Foodies tells you about what & where the celebrities eat, from healthy lifestyles to haute cuisine.

programme.title: Euromaxx
programme.desc: Everything you've ever wanted to know about Europe - from traditions and habits to culture shocks and record breakers.

programme.title: Lion Mums S3
programme.desc: We find a hapless Nabilah viciously put down by Miss Sim for her awkward body frame. Claude steps in to become her knight in shining armour, but is this genuine concern? At the same time, Winston's impending departure from Hua Seng Secondary causes some tension between him and Spencer. Will he eventually desert Spencer for friends at Anson High?

programme.title: 热辣滚烫
programme.desc: 大学毕业后仅仅工作短暂的一段时间杜乐莹便退回家中宅家长达十年之久她无所事事拒绝和外界做过多接触甚至和家人的关系也变得紧张起来在和离婚回到娘家的妹妹乐丹一次激烈的冲突后乐莹选择离家出走并且在烧烤店找了服务员的工作勉强维生爱情亲情人生似乎一时间均跌入了谷底而阴差阳错间乐莹又结识了落魄的拳击教练昊坤她支持着他的梦想彼此又不得不去面对残酷的现实人生至暗时刻随波逐流的女孩是否决心逆流而上.

programme.title: 老广的味道 第九季
programme.desc: 老广的味道第九季继续坚持上山下海呈现地道广味通过现场纪录广东农民渔民的耕作及捕捞贴地气传播劳动者的正能量.

programme.title: 在世界的角落扎营
programme.desc: 谢韵仪是公认的冒险玩家而郭妃丽则是大家眼中的贵妇两人却在近几年成为了好朋友一起到泰国挑战种种户外活动的她们会闹出什么样的笑话在营火旁聊起了各自的恋爱经历和爱情观她们又会透露出什么秘密.

programme.title: 星 料理
programme.desc: 在第一集里李南星与传统菜头粿店老板合作制作了全新的一道菜 海鲜菜头粿在老板和他女儿的协助之下李南星不仅融合了海鲜饼和菜头粿也完美结合了两种烹调方法煎与炸这道香脆又细嫩的菜头粿不但得到了Chef Eric的肯定也让小贩中心左邻右舍的摊贩尝了之后赞不绝口.

programme.title: 叶问 2
programme.desc: After defending himself against the Japanese army in the first film, Ip Man goes with his family to start anew in Hong Kong. However, Ip finds out the hard way that the Hong Kong martial arts world is controlled by a group of martial arts masters, led by the powerful Master Hung. To survive in Hong Kong, Ip not only needs to gain acceptance from the masters, but also from the corrupted British-run police force and an arrogant British boxer. 1949年叶问甄子丹饰带同妻儿前往香港建立新的家园幸得到在报馆当主编的梁根敖嘉年饰借出天台予.

programme.title: 灵探
programme.desc: 白烨等找不到控告天诚和捷锐的证据只好将他们释放再明目张胆地跟踪他们捷锐向天诚投诉每天都被警察跟踪担心自己会被出卖天诚突然攻击捷锐欲置他于死地幸好白烨等及时闯入阻止天诚伺机逃跑却突然心脏病发猝死.

programme.title: 灵探
programme.desc: 梦萍从淑琴身上醒来离开淑琴的身体却认不得淑琴不解自己怎么会在淑琴体内她四处游荡慢慢恢复记忆想起自己死后当上冥警因预感到人界的家人出事到人界来寻找家人的事如今却对家人失去记忆.

programme.title: 食在好源头
programme.desc: 同样第一次来到东方之珠香港要来这里找食材的源头就一定要往郊区走Pornsak很惊讶的发现竟然有紫色的花椰菜从此以后大大改变他对蔬菜的刻板印象紫色的花椰菜和一般白色的味道一样吗.

programme.title: 小屋大作
programme.desc: 随着屋主对于房子室内设计越来越有自己的要求和主见房屋经纪更要懂得投其所好本周陈罗密欧和鍾琴两人将扮演一起作伴看房的亲戚而Barry Koo陈汉玮扮演将有什么好推荐能成功收服他们的心.

programme.title: 喜事年年
programme.desc: 喜事年年.

programme.title: 喜事年年
programme.desc: 喜事年年.

programme.title: 阿公来做饭
programme.desc: 节目每集会邀请一位"阿公"示范家传料理主持人钟琴将搭配不同的艺人嘉宾"现学现煮"展开一场厨艺大比拼有了之前的经验钟琴也学会耍花样特地聘请小助理"Pattern女王"阳光可乐与她并肩作战现场也会邀请一位名厨以专业的角度多年的经验分析阿公的步骤并担任裁判的角色点评两位学徒主持人的厨艺纠正他们所犯下的错误最后阿公亲友团和名厨会当场试吃两位"学徒"的作品并投票选出该集的"阿公接班人".

programme.title: 晚间新闻
programme.desc: 晚间新闻每日为您提供最全面的本地与全球新闻报道.

programme.title: 多年后的全家福
programme.desc: 富贵与妻子莲娜育有一对儿女叶健康与叶平安8岁的健康在新年前被人拐走当时有人见到他和大地的儿子丰收在一起大地也出外找丰收却车祸身亡过后大地的妻子邀富贵一起经营农场多年来富贵一直没有放弃寻找健康.

programme.title: 多年后的全家福
programme.desc: 平安频频偶遇来自泰北的神秘男子阿朗丰收怀疑他跟踪平安Nimosa取出手机拍阿朗的照片阿朗要Nimosa删除照片不慎碰到Nimosa的臀部Nimosa大喊非礼丰收要报警捉阿朗阿朗突然说自己是平安的哥哥叶健康.

programme.title: Super BOOMi S8
programme.desc: Super BOOMi S8.

programme.title: Super BOOMi S8
programme.desc: Super BOOMi S8.

programme.title: 哆啦A梦
programme.desc: 在这系列卡通动画里小朋友们将看到哆啦A梦 - 这只来自未来世界的机器猫如何应用它的法宝协助其主人大雄解决生活上的各种难题.

programme.title: 华文"浆"好玩
programme.desc: 第五系列的 华文浆好玩 回来了兴致勃勃的小朋友勇闯蒋依讲博士的黏浆实验室为的就是挑战自己华文实力一旦失败就将成为蒋依讲博士的小跟班想要逃出实验室他们必须在五个回合解开所有的华文谜题他们能否成功逃脱还是得乖乖地接受黏浆浴的洗礼呢.

programme.title: 奇趣特工队 S3
programme.desc: 凯奇是一个充满好奇心和正义感的男孩他还有一个神秘的身份奇趣特工队队长他和他的伙伴们调皮骄傲又听得懂外星语的宠物 "闪电猫" 彬彬有礼温和待人的管家 "艾尔" 以及意外流落地球的外星访客 "嘟嘟公主"组成了守护小镇的奇趣特工队.

programme.title: 星期二特写 非凡的告白2
programme.desc: 太平间是生命谢幕后的最后归处这里的法医与法医助理以理性与温度并存的态度穿行于冰冷的环境之中追寻事实的真相更守护着逝者最后的尊严在这些专业人员的坚守里蕴藏着难以被看见的人性光芒他们用专业解读生命的终章用细致与敬畏延续对生命的尊重也为生者提供最坚实的真相与答案.

programme.title: 嫣语赋
programme.desc: 讲述了秋府最不受宠的大小姐秋嫣如何凭借自己的努力和智慧从深闺大院中走出来在一桩桩迷案中抽丝剥茧在一次次困难中辗转前行与冷面腹黑王爷梁翊从一路斗智斗勇到相伴相知最终二人收获了属于他们的幸福和爱情的故事.

programme.title: 嫣语赋
programme.desc: 讲述了秋府最不受宠的大小姐秋嫣如何凭借自己的努力和智慧从深闺大院中走出来在一桩桩迷案中抽丝剥茧在一次次困难中辗转前行与冷面腹黑王爷梁翊从一路斗智斗勇到相伴相知最终二人收获了属于他们的幸福和爱情的故事.

programme.title: 健康2.0 (2024)
programme.desc: 只要动手做健康就会来提供生活保健小撇步轻松看轻松学轻松做知名健康节目健康2.0每集邀请医生家庭医师复健专家和营养师共同守护全家健康.

programme.title: 小娘惹翡翠山之开门见山
programme.desc: 艺人们在修杰楷邀约下齐聚宜兰展开一场开门见山之旅选房环节暗藏心思谁的小心思被揭穿高空绳索惊险连连尖叫声此起彼落有人的形象瞬间崩坏而那副神秘的开门见山游戏卡更让艺人们直球坦白爆料不断一连串笑点与泪点心与心也在爆笑中逐渐靠近.

programme.title: 再见明天
programme.desc: 为收集奶妈眼泪四人穿越无裤宇宙默剧宇宙音乐剧宇宙最后抵达"AI宇宙"在那里每人都有专属AI助手CHLOE发现妹妹小洁在这个宇宙里依然活着她逐渐意识到自己应该放下多年 的自责接受自己应得的爱最终CHLOE在这个宇宙中与小洁和解摆脱了内疚.

programme.title: 再见明天
programme.desc: 凯义在凯义的幸福生活真人秀中成了巨星与长大后的Toro和婷婷重逢沉浸在幸福中可后来凯义发现这一 切不过是个真人秀而Toro也只是扮演他儿子的演员凯义逐渐意识到这个节目实际上是在嘲讽他的人生和经历把他描绘成宇宙中最大的失败者.

programme.title: 狮城六点半
programme.desc: (Live) 狮城6点半每日为您提供最全面的本地新闻头条与报道.

programme.title: 天之骄女
programme.desc: 志鸿陪淑君去找健司要求他履行秘书合约回家后志鸿得知健司可能是志龙激动不已淑君劝他冷静设法帮健司恢复记忆.

programme.title: 天之骄女
programme.desc: 天雷雇杀手在路上枪击尚豪彩曦穿上尚豪的外套引火上身负伤逃走却被天雷追到废弃仓库.

programme.title: 天之骄女
programme.desc: 阿炮被捕供出天雷指使杀人尚豪担心彩曦仁美在旁安慰彩曦之死让Kuro悲痛欲绝想轻生天雷吓得急忙阻止.

programme.title: 晚间新闻
programme.desc: (Live) 晚间新闻每日为您提供最全面的本地与全球新闻报道.

programme.title: 时间见证人
programme.desc: 黄馨恩从小就听过爸爸聊起祖父在二战期间为了生存而必须做出种种不堪回首的事那些故事曾经让她怀疑直到她随着历史学者凭借最新科技去探索新加坡在二战期间的那段往事在追根究底之后馨恩也同时明白了那个不苟言笑脾气暴躁的祖父经历过的那些挣扎136部队的抗日份子究竟需要做些什么才能捍卫国土.

programme.title: 台湾百味
programme.desc: 这个节目专门推荐台湾美食餐厅透过节目将台湾料理带给更多人认识以及餐馆背后动人故事.

programme.title: 收场
programme.desc: 收场.

programme.title: Jendela Hati
programme.desc: Farah agrees to marry her brother-in-law, Lukman, to fulfill her sister's final wish. However, Lukman seems reluctant to marry Farah.

programme.title: Jendela Hati
programme.desc: Lukman decides to move back to his own place with Farah. He worries about Myra when she goes missing after the wedding.

programme.title: Jendela Hati
programme.desc: Myra is curious as to why Johan is volunteering to help her out despite being only recently acquainted. Farah wonders if Lukman is hiding something from her.

programme.title: Jendela Hati
programme.desc: Budi tries to advise Lukman when Lukman is still unsure about his marriage to Farah. Farah feels slighted by Lukman's action.

programme.title: Jendela Hati
programme.desc: Farah comes up with a plan to win Lukman's heart. Lukman has been reminded of the past in his dreams for the past few days.

programme.title: Jendela Hati
programme.desc: Lukman tries to make amends for his mistakes towards Farah. Zulkarnain's return increases tension between the family members.

programme.title: End of Transmission
programme.desc: End of Transmission.

programme.title: Legenda Puteri Qaseh
programme.desc: A story in the kingdom of Kayajaya, a kind-hearted village girl realizes that she is the rightful heir to the throne and must quickly learn the customs to become a queen.

programme.title: Indonesia Authentic Places
programme.desc: For most of the time, Indonesia is a magnet for most travelers and adventurers. With more than seventeen thousand islands scattered across over five million kilometers and three time zones that needs a lifetime to explore and appreciate its natural beauty. Same with its title, the program sums it all up into twenty-five must-visit authentic destinations that simply cannot be missed. From defining beaches to magical mountains and wild forests, be prepared to be amazed by authentic Indonesia.

programme.title: Lights. Camera. Action On Caldecott
programme.desc: From its inception in 1937 to 2017, Caldecott Broadcast Centre bore witness to key milestones in Singapore's history. This documentary is a walk down memory lane into those key moments.

programme.title: Tetamu Ramadan
programme.desc: Rashid learns about his mothers past. Nina is trying to accept the fact that her boyfriend who is as old as his father used to date her mother. Rozainah is in dilemma, trying to let go of the past but it keeps triggering her. Admist all these, Salahudin learns that his family is keeping a secret from him. Can Farid, Rozainah, Nina and Rashid keep the secret from Salahudin? Watch Tetamu Ramadan a family drama filled with secrets.

programme.title: Jom Berbuka
programme.desc: Celebrities cooking alongside their family member or friend. During this enjoyable experience, the celebrity will get to spend time buying groceries together, teaching and sharing their recipe, cooking method & cooking tips with family members or friends.

programme.title: Resepi Most Wanted
programme.desc: A travelogue that showcases the diverse cuisines of different races, ethnicities, and cultures in Malaysia, enriched with humor and illustrations by the two hosts and the local community.

programme.title: Aku Yang Kau Sakiti
programme.desc: Furious after seeing pictures of Bella and her boyfriend in bed, Zaki kicks Bella out of the house. Raikal suspects something is amiss with Bella's situation.

programme.title: Aku Yang Kau Sakiti
programme.desc: Unable to pay her debt back to the loan shark, Mak Su attempts to sell Amanda to the loan sharks. Amanda seeks Zaki help to stay away from Mak Su.

programme.title: Kyrgyzstan
programme.desc: Kyrgyzstan is a country that resembles a hidden paradise and is seldom explored. This Central Asian nation is home to 1,001 extraordinary treasures that remain untouched by modernity. With its snowy mountains, sea-blue lakes, rows of white yurts, and hundreds of tame horses, Kyrgyzstan offers a unique experience for travellers.

programme.title: Ini Baru Rare: Iceland
programme.desc: Iceland, a sub-Arctic country, boasts breathtaking landscapes and natural phenomena that are rarely found elsewhere in the world. Recently, it has gained recognition among global travelers, becoming a paradise for photographers, 4WD drivers, and enthusiasts of cold climates.

programme.title: Hospital Loveline
programme.desc: Opah plays matchmaker between Dr. Arfan and Sophia. Meanwhile, Dr. Arfan challenges Dr. Shamsul's diagnosis on one of his patients but is warned not to misuse his authority just because he works at his father's hospital.

programme.title: Aku Seorang Perempuan
programme.desc: Siti Noraisya struggles as she faces challenges embarking on her own business. She rejects Ehsan's help, but all is not lost as there is a silver lining in every dark clouds.

programme.title: Legenda Puteri Qaseh
programme.desc: A story in the kingdom of Kayajaya, a kind-hearted village girl realizes that she is the rightful heir to the throne and must quickly learn the customs to become a queen.

programme.title: Indonesia Authentic Places
programme.desc: For most of the time, Indonesia is a magnet for most travelers and adventurers. With more than seventeen thousand islands scattered across over five million kilometers and three time zones that needs a lifetime to explore and appreciate its natural beauty. Same with its title, the program sums it all up into twenty-five must-visit authentic destinations that simply cannot be missed. From defining beaches to magical mountains and wild forests, be prepared to be amazed by authentic Indonesia.

programme.title: Jom Berbuka
programme.desc: Celebrities cooking alongside their family member or friend. During this enjoyable experience, the celebrity will get to spend time buying groceries together, teaching and sharing their recipe, cooking method & cooking tips with family members or friends.

programme.title: Resepi Most Wanted
programme.desc: A travelogue that showcases the diverse cuisines of different races, ethnicities, and cultures in Malaysia, enriched with humor and illustrations by the two hosts and the local community.

programme.title: Berita
programme.desc: (Live) Catch the latest local and international news on Suria.

programme.title: Andai Tiada Suri
programme.desc: Hisyam Hamid and Zahiril Adzim from the hit drama Andai Tiada Dia swap scripts for spatulas as they step into the kitchen together. Catch the laughter as they fumble and have fun cooking classic Ramadan favourites all under the watchful and witty guidance of Malaysia's iconic TV Moms.

programme.title: Apa Nak Masak Ni?
programme.desc: Hosted by husband and wife celebrities couple in each episode with a concept of ala-ala dramasitkom that focus ontheir daily routine during Ramadan. Their favourite dishes during Ramadan and according to their birth state country.

programme.title: Hospital Loveline
programme.desc: Sophia packs food for Dr. Arfan to thank him for helping her grandmother. Seeing this, Dr. Nabila feels disappointed and feels that Dr. Arfan is growing more distant from her.

programme.title: Marina
programme.desc: Marina runs into Izfahan and thanks him after narrowly escaping an assault. Izfahan urges her to file a police report. Meanwhile, Marina comes to the painful realisation that she has been manipulated by Dato' Fahad.

programme.title: Comedy Galatta Season 5
programme.desc: Get ready to LOL with a new season of Comedy Galatta!

programme.title: Seithi
programme.desc: Tamil Seithi focuses primarily on local and international news, information and current affairs. Catch the online news portal at http://seithi.mediacorp.sg/.

programme.title: David (2013)
programme.desc: A gangster in trouble with the law, an amateur guitarist planning to assassinate a politician and a fisherman in love with a woman he cannot be with are all named David, and they share a connection.

programme.title: Live in Bytes
programme.desc: Groove to some new live music with your favourite artists.

programme.title: Doddamane Huduga
programme.desc: Surya, a boy belonging to a big family of the town, moves out of the house when ignored by his father Rajivappa. However, after a few years, he comes back to rescue his land from a local criminal.

programme.title: Headline News 2025/2026
programme.desc: The latest top stories of the hour.

programme.title: East Asia Tonight
programme.desc: Spotlight on East Asia, a region steeped in history and now helping to write the future of our world. We'll break down the key stories and explain why they matter.

programme.title: The New Locals
programme.desc: The 10th arrondissement in Paris is known locally as "Little Jaffna", a haven for the city's South Asian population and a hub for 50,000 Sri Lankan Tamils who call France their home.

programme.title: The New Locals
programme.desc: Cambodia's busy capital of Phnom Penh is home to about a 1,000 Nigerians who are beginning to seamlessly integrate into their adopted country's culture.

programme.title: Singapore Tonight
programme.desc: From business to politics, health to technology, the latest news from Singapore and analysis of the impact.

programme.title: Talking Point
programme.desc: With a fresh approach to tackling the issues of the day, Talking Point investigates a current issue or event, offering different perspectives to local stories and reveals how it all affects you.

programme.title: Asia Tonight
programme.desc: CNA correspondents bring you the top stories of the day with 'live' reports and interviews to keep you up-to-date on the day's events.

programme.title: A.I. Isn't
programme.desc: A.I. Isn't.

programme.title: Headline News 2025/2026
programme.desc: The latest top stories of the hour.

programme.title: CNA Correspondent
programme.desc: They're your eyes and ears around the globe. CNA's network of correspondents shines a light on stories from their corners of the world, from groundbreaking events to up-and-coming trends..

programme.title: Salt of the Earth
programme.desc: This is a one-of-a-kind salt, drawn from geothermal springs and the pressure of geological time that captures the taste of the earth itself.

programme.title: Talking Point
programme.desc: With a fresh approach to tackling the issues of the day, Talking Point investigates a current issue or event, offering different perspectives to local stories and reveals how it all affects you.

programme.title: Singapore Tonight
programme.desc: From business to politics, health to technology, the latest news from Singapore and analysis of the impact.

programme.title: On The Red Dot
programme.desc: On The Red Dot offers weekly in-depth analysis and discussion on key issues and events that matter to Singaporeans.

programme.title: A.I. Isn't
programme.desc: A.I. Isn't.

programme.title: Asia Tonight
programme.desc: CNA correspondents bring you the top stories of the day with 'live' reports and interviews to keep you up-to-date on the day's events.

programme.title: Salt of the Earth
programme.desc: This is a one-of-a-kind salt, drawn from geothermal springs and the pressure of geological time that captures the taste of the earth itself.

programme.title: Love After 60
programme.desc: These lonely seniors, all over 60, are searching for love. But in conservative Indian society, they must defy taboos and face judgmenteven from their own families.

programme.desc: From business to politics, health to technology, the latest news from Singapore and analysis of the impact.

programme.desc: They're your eyes and ears around the globe. CNA's network of correspondents shines a light on stories from their corners of the world, from groundbreaking events to up-and-coming trends..

programme.desc: Cambodia's busy capital of Phnom Penh is home to about a 1,000 Nigerians who are beginning to seamlessly integrate into their adopted country's culture.
